original_abstract: Abstract In recent years, the study of artificial intelligence (AI) has undergone a paradigm shift. This has been propelled by the groundbreaking capabilities of generative models both in supervised and unsupervised learning scenarios. Generative AI has shown state-of-the-art performance in solving perplexing real-world conundrums in fields such as image translation, medical diagnostics, textual imagery fusion, natural language processing, and beyond. This paper documents the systematic review and analysis of recent advancements and techniques in Generative AI with a detailed discussion of their applications including application-specific models. Indeed, the major impact that generative AI has made to date, has been in language generation with the development of large language models, in the field of image translation and several other interdisciplinary applications of generative AI. Moreover, the primary contribution of this paper lies in its coherent synthesis of the latest advancements in these areas, seamlessly weaving together contemporary breakthroughs in the field. Particularly, how it shares an exploration of the future trajectory for generative AI. In conclusion, the paper ends with a discussion of Responsible AI principles, and the necessary ethical considerations for the sustainability and growth of these generative models.
humanized_abstract: Abstract: Today, the landscape of the field of Artificial Intelligence has changed significantly in the recent years. The advancements and achievements in generative models in both supervised and unsupervised learning have set a new benchmark in achieving solutions to several complex problems in the real life, starting from image translation, to medical diagnosis, image to text generation, and even natural language processing and so many other applications. In this paper, a systematic review will be presented, with a deep dive into the state of the art of the Generative AI, the recent developments and applications including the models specifically designed for each application. Generative AI, so far, has impacted the world of language generation, by the development of large language models, as well as the image translation and the numerous interdisciplinary applications of generative AI. Also, this paper bridges the recent discoveries in the mentioned fields, connecting the current research in generative AI, with an investigation of the potential future developments in the field of Generative AI. Finally, it concludes with a brief discussion on the Responsible AI principles and the ethics needed for the sustainable development of generative AI.
